perceptual_evaluation.overall: All five sentences were almost fully understandable.
perceptual_evaluation.remaining_errors: Most samples contained only one or two mispronounced words.
perceptual_evaluation.comparison: Checkpoint 3000 had a slightly lower validation loss, but checkpoint 2750 sounded more natural and accurate.

conclusion: Female-only specialization substantially improved Hindi pronunciation and target alignment. Checkpoint 2750 with greedy decoding and seed 5107 produced the best overall result.
